message:
ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for Pages deployment

Deploys only the demo HTML + WASM files to GitHub Pages via
actions/deploy-pages. Triggers on changes to the demo, browser-core
package, or the workflow itself. Also copies demo as index.html so
the root URL works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+name: Deploy Demo to GitHub Pages
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'asupersync_web_demo.html'
+      - 'packages/browser-core/**'
+      - '.github/workflows/pages.yml'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pages: write
+  id-token: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: pages
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  deploy:
+    environment:
+      name: github-pages
+      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Prepare Pages artifact
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p _site/packages/browser-core
+          cp asupersync_web_demo.html _site/index.html
+          cp asupersync_web_demo.html _site/asupersync_web_demo.html
+          cp packages/browser-core/asupersync.js _site/packages/browser-core/
+          cp packages/browser-core/asupersync_bg.wasm _site/packages/browser-core/
+          cp packages/browser-core/index.js _site/packages/browser-core/
+
+      - uses: actions/configure-pages@v5
+      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
+      - name: Deploy
+        id: deployment
+        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
